info.name: Lorwyn Changeling
info.description: The Lorwyn Changeling species from Lorwyn: First Light.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

description.p: The changelings of Lorwyn are charismatic shapeshifters able to crudely mimic the forms of creatures and plants. Unlike most shapeshifters, however, their innate powers don't allow them to truly disguise themselves; rather, their transformations are purely surface level.

No matter their form, Lorwyn changelings keep their key traits: blue-green skin, tufts of tentacle-like fur, and bulbous yellow eyes with slitted pupils. The true changeling identity of a bug-eyed tree, teal elk, or furry boulder is always easy to spot. These counterfeits are so plain that many Lorwyn denizens find the effect inexplicably charming.
Changelings from Lorwyn live in a vast, mystical cave called Velis Vel Grotto (see chapter 2). Once per year, many changelings make a pilgrimage to the grotto to contemplate their past deeds.

ul.li: Size: Medium (about 4–7 feet tall) or Small (about 2–4 feet tall), chosen when you select this species

description.p: As an Lorwyn Changeling, you have these special traits.

Shape Self. As an Action, you can reshape your body to a two-legged Humanoid shape or to a four-legged Beast shape. While you have a Humanoid shape, you can wear clothing and armor made for a Humanoid of your size.
Darkvision. You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.
Delightful Imitator. You have proficiency in the Deception or Performance skill.
Unpredictable Movement. When you roll Initiative and don't have Disadvantage on that roll, you can take the Dash action as a Reaction.

As an Action, you can reshape your body to a two-legged Humanoid shape or to a four-legged Beast shape. While you have a Humanoid shape, you can wear clothing and armor made for a Humanoid of your size.

sheet.description: You can reshape your body to a two-legged Humanoid shape or to a four-legged Beast shape. While you have a Humanoid shape, you can wear clothing and armor made for a Humanoid of your size.

description.p: You have proficiency in the Deception or Performance skill.
When you roll Initiative and don't have Disadvantage on that roll, you can take the Dash action as a Reaction.

sheet.description: When you roll Initiative and don't have Disadvantage on that roll, you can take the Dash action.
